title: Thank you mentors for a memorable year
author: Aryan
message: Holy fuck what a year it has been. Its gone by so fast. I remember distinctly my first day, and most importantly my first mentor event - the mexican dinner. What a year. Quite eventful, very fun and exciting. While, I am filled with great sadness that these mentor events have come to a close for me, I really hope and pray that you guys can keep going for the next year and the year beyond, for you have made my university experience beyond special. I do not think I would've gotten this experience elsewhere, and i am sincerely grateful for each and every one of you guys for giving me such wonderful and fond memories to look back on, to rejoice and to relive in my head. This year would've been nothing short of boring, insufferable and depressing if it wasnt for you guys and your events that bring together so many CS and AI people. Thank you soooo soo much for everything. I wish you all the very best and continue helping first years! THANK YOU!!!!!1111
